home.subtitle: What would you like to watch today?
home.getStartedText: Add a provider or playlist to watch live TV, movies and series.

live.emptyText: Import a playlist in the Providers section to see your channels here.
live.playSoon: Playback activates with the player integration (phase 4).

providers.title: Providers
providers.name: Name
providers.passwordHint: Stored securely in the Windows Credential Manager.
providers.deleteConfirm: Remove this provider and all related data?
providers.emptyText: Add your first provider or playlist. EXIPTV supports M3U files, M3U URLs and Xtream accounts.

search.hint: Search currently covers live TV channels. Movies, series and programs follow in upcoming phases.

common.comingPhase: This area unlocks in development phase {{phase}}.

empty.favorites: No favorites yet. Star channels, movies or series to collect them here.
empty.recordings: No recordings yet. Scheduled and running recordings appear here.
empty.history: Your history is empty. Anything you watch shows up here.
empty.guide: No guide data yet. Add an EPG source to a provider to see the TV guide.
empty.movies: No movies yet. Movies appear once a provider with VOD content is set up.
empty.series: No series yet. Series appear once a provider with series content is set up.
